title: Tenderly Smoked Mexican Jerusalem Artichokes Mole Poblano
description: A pungent and aerated nostalgic Mexican dish featuring Jerusalem artichokes in a mole poblano sauce, served in a bamboo steamer with ssam wrap, gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Roast the chopped Jerusalem artichokes in a 400 degree oven for 20 minutes, or until tender.
Soak the ancho and mulato chilies in hot water for 20 minutes, then drain and chop.
In a blender, combine the roasted Jerusalem artichokes, chopped chilies, sliced almonds, dark raisins, sesame seeds, and smoked paprika, and blend until smooth.
Heat the blended mixture in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until heated through.
Prepare the ssam wrap by cutting it into 8-10 pieces.
Assemble the dish by placing a spoonful of the mole poblano sauce onto a piece of ssam wrap, and serving in a bamboo steamer.
Steam the assembled dish for 5 minutes, or until the ssam wrap is tender.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional sesame seeds and smoked paprika if desired.
